notes: Active runtime frames are 256x320 HiDPI sprites, and this character uses visualScale 1.25 in the pixel-world renderer so the detailed cloak motifs and water droplets are not squeezed too small. Front idle was manually recut from the full reference sheet with extra cloak padding; only the connected paper-background gap between the boots and the source guide line were removed, preserving the white inner robe shape. Front step A is an approved source; front step B is a horizontal mirror of front step A, and front passing uses front idle. Side idle and passing use the approved left-facing standing side image, mirrored for right-facing; side step A and step B keep the approved walking side pose. Back idle is AI-generated from the approved design; back step A uses the approved back-walk-away frame with the cloak covering the white inner robe, and back step B is mirrored from step A. Back passing uses idle. The older 64x80 and 128x160 sets are retained only as fallbacks.
